entities.name: CEREAL GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the genome of cereal crops to understand their architecture and expressed components

entities.name: CEREAL GENOMES
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material in cereal crops

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Basic units of heredity linked to agronomically important traits

entities.name: AGRONOMICALLY IMPORTANT TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of crops that are valuable for agricultural productivity and quality

entities.name: MOLECULAR GENETIC MAPPING
entities.description: A technique used to identify the location of quantitative trait loci on a chromosome

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI (QTL)
entities.description: Regions of DNA associated with a particular complex phenotypic trait

entities.name: COMPLEX TRAITS
entities.description: Traits controlled by the interaction of multiple genes

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of improving crop characteristics through selective mating or genetic manipulation

entities.name: MOLECULAR CLONING
entities.description: The process of isolating a gene to examine its sequence and function

entities.name: ALLELIC VARIATION
entities.description: Differences in DNA sequences between alleles of a gene within a population

entities.name: NOVEL ALLELES
entities.description: Newly identified versions of genes that can enhance crop traits

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of how genes and their products work to produce a phenotype

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis of a group of alleles inherited together from a single parent

entities.name: CULTIVATED CROPS
entities.description: Plants grown by humans for food, fuel, or other agricultural purposes

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield or efficiency in production

entities.name: PHENOTYPES
entities.description: The observable physical or biochemical characteristics of an organism

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: The genetic makeup of an individual organism

relationships.description: is used to identify and isolate
